subject: urban takeover readiness update for Chicago | Albert Einstein | Q1 review | INIT-1325
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Chicago. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Albert Einstein and Marie Curie as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-1325. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
